title: Welcome
text:
Hello. Welcome to my personal website.
I was raised in Honduras and at the moment I am living in Germany. As of 07.2023 I am a doctoral researcher at the Cluster of Excellence, SimTech in Stuttgart. Soon I will be joining TU Dortmund and I will be working with Dr. Paul Bürkner in Computational Statistics. In general, I am interested in Bayesian Inference, Prior specification, Probabilistic Programming and High Dimensional Statistics.
Do not hesitate in contacting me if you ever want to work together or if you have doubts or comments about my work.

title: Presentations
text:
The list is not complete but I have presented at the following events

NordStat 2023. Gothenburg, Sweden. Contributed Talk.
BayesComp 2023. Levi, Finland. Poster.
German Probability and Statistics Days. Essen, Germany. Contributed Talk.
ICSDS 2022, Florence, Italy 2022. Student travel award given by the IMS.
